title: The Davy Back Fight Challenge
description: Luffy enters the final Davy Back Fight bout against Foxy, whose slow-slow powers and cheating make the match stranger than a normal fight.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene focuses on Luffy, Foxy, Nami, Usopp, Zoro. Luffy enters the final Davy Back Fight bout against Foxy, whose slow-slow powers and cheating make the match stranger than a normal fight.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ryan-- You can't take my choppy--!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: That was amazing! Those punks are strong!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I'm so touched! I'm gonna cry!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: imbeciles... how did it end like this!?

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Ah! That's right. I almost forgot!

dialogue.speaker: Porche
dialogue.text: There it is! The ending whistle!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Nami-chan! Nico Robin-chan! Did you see it!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Did my awe- some- Ness Sun You?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Which will the straw hats' captain choose?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ah! Is he talking about me?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oh no, I'm not ready for this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Damn! I knew he would pick me!

summary: Luffy enters the final Davy Back Fight bout against Foxy, whose slow-slow powers and cheating make the match stranger than a normal fight.
